wash_trade_concerns: BCH spot volume on major CEXs (Binance, Coinbase) appears broadly organic given order-book depth and trade-size distribution, though smaller exchanges with BCH pairs have historically shown inflated volume; CoinGecko's trust-score filtering removes the worst offenders from its aggregated figure of roughly $200–400 M/day as of mid-2025.
rationale: BCH daily transaction counts have hovered in the 40,000–55,000 range through Q2 2025 per Blockchair public explorer data, well below its 2018 peak but stable year-over-year. Long-term holder supply (coins unmoved >155 days) is estimated at ~78% of circulating supply based on Glassnode free-tier cohort data as of early July 2025, suggesting limited near-term sell pressure. Exchange-flow USD figures (inflow/outflow) are not available on free tiers of Glassnode or CryptoQuant without a paid subscription, so those fields are null. CoinGecko lists BCH market cap at approximately $8–9 B and 24 h volume near $250 M as of 2025-07-10, implying a volume-to-market-cap ratio of ~3%, which is within normal bounds for a large-cap asset.
